# Policy ${TITLE}

Get default properties of [all](./Policy${NAME}All.md) policies in selected APIC.

Filter options:
  - [name](./Policy${NAME}Name.md)
  - pod id
  - node name
  - reference policy name
  - unused
  - used

View options:
  - [default](./Policy${NAME}All.md)
  - [usage](./Policy${NAME}Usage.md)
  - [intf](./Policy${NAME}Intf.md)
  - [verbose](./Policy${NAME}Verbose.md)

Output options:
  - [default](./Policy${NAME}All.md)
  - [json](./Policy${NAME}Json.md)

Command options

```
DOC_TEMPLATE:get_aci_policy_${TEST}.help:output
```
